stemHtml: You are approaching to land and are experiencing communications receiver failure. You decide to continue the flight as planned, with an approach on RWY27. Next in your flight plan is a descent from 6 000 ft to 2 000 ft. You head to transmit blind your report to ATC, followed by a complete repetition. The phraseology you will use is…

options.a: NEXT REPORT AT TIME 1201, ALL STATIONS RECEIVING RADIO CHECK.
options.b: NEXT REPORT FINAL RWY 27, ALL STATIONS RECEIVING RADIO CHECK.
options.c: NEXT REPORT FINAL RWY 27, HEADING 270, CONTINUING FLIGHT AS PLANNED.
options.d: HEADING 270, CONTINUING FLIGHT AS PER FLIGHT PLAN.
